# VESDA / Xtralis / Honeywell — Aspirating Smoke Detection for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## VESDA-E VEU
- Dual-wavelength laser detection with Flair technology
- Sensitivity: 0.0015% to 20% obs/m (adjustable 4 alarm levels)
- Alert -> Action -> Fire 1 -> Fire 2 (programmable)
- Up to 4 intake pipes, 50m each, 200m total
- Up to 100 sampling holes
- Transport time: 15-30 seconds (container config)
- Operating temp: -20C to 60C
- Power: 21-30 VDC, 3.5W
- Comms: Relay, RS-485, Ethernet, VESDAnet
- Listed: UL 268, FM Approved

## 40-ft Container Config
- 1 VESDA-E VEU unit sufficient
- 2 pipes running length of container (hot aisle + cold aisle)
- 4-8 sampling holes per pipe (8-16 total)
- In-rack capillary tubes for fastest detection
- Response time: 15-30 seconds from smoke to Alert

## Alarm Thresholds (container)
| Level | Setting | Purpose |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Alert | 0.005% obs/m | Very early warning |
| Action | 0.02% obs/m | Pre-fire, prepare suppression |
| Fire 1 | 0.10% obs/m | Trigger Novec release |
| Fire 2 | 0.15% obs/m | Backup/confirmed |

## Pricing: $5,500-$9,500 installed (unit + pipe + sampling + install)
## Assembled in USA by Honeywell
